dataBoundary.source: CMC Keyless Public API trial endpoint; no API key, no signup, read-only market data.

marketRegime.label: selective_rotation
marketRegime.reason: Market is constructive but uneven; prefer higher-liquidity assets and tighter invalidation.

strategy.name: selective_rotation_bnb_ecosystem_rotation
strategy.objective: Generate a backtestable strategy spec for an autonomous trading agent without executing trades.
signals: CMC quotes/latest style price and volume momentum
CMC technical indicator style RSI and trend score
CMC derivatives style funding and open-interest change
entryRules: Enter only assets in the selected universe.
Require volume expansion above the market-context baseline.
Reject entries if RSI exceeds 72 or liquidity score falls below 0.55.
exitRules: Exit if asset breaks regime support or underperforms BNB by 3%.
Scale out at 1.4R and close if volume momentum fades.
invalidationRules: Invalidate if liquidity score drops below 0.55 or stablecoin liquidity trend turns falling.

risk.stopLossRule: Exit if asset breaks regime support or underperforms BNB by 3%.
risk.takeProfitRule: Scale out at 1.4R and close if volume momentum fades.
risk.invalidationRule: Invalidate if liquidity score drops below 0.55 or stablecoin liquidity trend turns falling.

backtest.replayInstruction: Replay against historical CMC-style snapshots; do not execute live orders.

sponsorCapabilityMapping.x402: Optional pay-per-call premium data access design; not used in local fixture.
sponsorCapabilityMapping.trustWallet: Future execution consumer only; not used in local fixture.
sponsorCapabilityMapping.bnbChain: Future execution venue only; not used in local fixture.
